MRK.rationale: Revenue is accelerating sequentially and the headline PE of 60x is distorted by a one-time Q2 charge, making underlying earnings power and pipeline expansion (ADC priority review) more attractive than the ratio suggests.

Gross margin of 72.9% and operating margin of 12.6% reflect strong core profitability despite the depressed net margin of 7.8%
FDA CRL for chronic cough candidate (Dec 21) is a minor pipeline setback, offset by priority review for Daiichi Sankyo lung cancer ADC (Dec 26)
